titleStmt.title: Stuttgart, Württembergische Landesbibliothek Stuttgart, WLB, Orient. Fol. 49
Testamentum Domini

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msContents.summary: The manuscript contains the Testamentum Domini. It can be dated between the 15th and the 17th century.

msItem.title: Testamentum Domini
msItem.incipit: Fols 3ra–3rbኪዳን፡ ዘእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወኮነ፡ እንከ፡ እምድኃረ፡ ተንሥአ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እምነ፡ ምውታን፡ ወአስተርአየ፡ ወተገሠ፡ እምቶማስ፡ ወማቴዎስ፡ ወዮሐንስ፡ ወ ተፈወስነ፡ ከመ፡ ተንሥአ፡ ሊቅነ፡ ወደቅነ፡ በገጽነ።...

msItem.title: Chapter 9
msItem.note: Chapter 9 also includes what is Chapter 10 in the edition, without rubrication or chapter number; the subsequent numbering therefore deviates from the edition

msItem.title: Chapter 19
msItem.note: Also contains what is Chapter 20 in the edition, (no rubrication or chapter number)

msItem.title: Chapter 41
msItem.note: not rubricated in the edition (part of Ch. 42)

msItem.colophon: Fol. 31rb...መዓርገ፡ አምኔነ፡ ሰላመ፡ ኃዲሳ፡ ለነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወ ጴጥሮ ስ፡ ወማቴዎስ፡ ጸሐፍዎ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ኪዳን፡ እንዘ፡ ያጽሕፎሙ፡ አግዚእነ፡ ወፈነው፡ በአርአያዝ፡ ኪዳን፡ ግጽወ፡ አምኢየሩሳሌም፡ ዶስቴዎስ፡ ወሲላስ፡ ወመግንዮስ፡ ወአቁላስ፡ አለ፡ ኃረዩ፡ ለመላእክተ፡ ኵሉ፡ በሐውርት፡ አሜን። ወእንሰ፡ ርኢኩ፡ አምእፍአሃ፡ ወአስከ፡ ውስጣ፡ ኅብራ፡ ወግብራ፡ ነኪር፡ ወዕፁታ፡ ፪ፍትሑ፡ በበምግባሮሙ።

msItem.title: Testamentum Domini in Galilea and Epistula Apostolorum
Maṣḥafa faws manfasāwi (by Michael of ʾAṯrīb)

supportDesc.extent:
Made of 175 folios, of which 5 blank 2r, 2vc, 119vb-c, 174vc-175v
290 265 70
supportDesc.foliation: Folio numbering left above in red ink: 1. on f. 120r

handDesc.handNote:
Main hand of the seventeenth century.
Fols 3r–119v Black; red. Regular, careful.

Second hand of the seventeenth century.
Fols 120r–174v Black; red. Regular, careful.

Later hand of the addition.
Fols 119rc–119va Black; red.

list.item: Fols 119rc–119vaInventory of manuscripts in Amharic, in a secondary hand.
Doodles and writing exercises on ff. 2va-b and 3rc (above).
Place left for the name of the owner on f. 29va. On other pages the name has been erased. On f. 43vc one could recognize the name of the donor's mother, Walatta Rufāʾel.
Fol. 1rExlibris of the library donation: "Der königl. öffentlichen Bibliothek zu Stuttgart. Gondar, 24. März 1853. Dr. Thd. Heuglin"

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards with punched leather; inner side covered with brockat.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
